titleStmt.title: SII 40.42: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 42. (A.R. No. B. 21 of 1930.) Paluvāyi, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the Śiva temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1177, Rākshasa, Kārttīka, śu. 15, Thursday, corresponding to 1255 A.D., October 17. However the week day was Sunday.

Records the construction of the Kāḷēśvara temple and renovation of the pinnacle at Pālavāya by Ullēpalli Bāchi-Reḍḍi, while Gaṁḍa-peṁḍāru Gaṅgayya-Sāhiṇi, a subordinate of the king was ruling the earth. Further it records that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Padumbāyi-Amma made a gift of lands to the temple for conducting aṅga-raṅga-bhōga in the temple, for the merit of her father Ammadēva and her husband Lakshmidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1177 Agunēṁṭi rākṣasa
saṁvatsara kā¨rttika suddha 15
guruvāramunāṁḍu
śrīmatu gaṇapatidēva
mahārājunaku
paramabhaktuṁḍaina śrīma
tu braṁmarākṣasagaṁ
ḍapeṁḍāru gaṁgayya sā
hiṇi dakṣaṇa sādaku
ṁḍai prithivirājyamu sē
yaṁgānu pālavāya
Anāṭi saṁsiddhamaina kā
lēśvaradēvara guḍi Ullēpalli
bācireḍḍi kaḷāśani¨rvvāhamu
gānu kaṭṭiṁpagānu śrīmanu
mahāmaṁḍalēsvara paduṁ
bāyi Aṁmmagāru sūci saṁ
tōṣa paḍe kālēśvaradēvara Aṁga
raṁgabhōgānaku tamataṁḍri
Aṁmadēvanikini tanu magaṁḍu
lakṣmīdēvanikini puṇyamugānu Ū
ri Uttarapu rēgaḍi peṭṭina datti
kha 1 na 10 Ā dēvara guḍi muṁ
daṭa nīru nēla maṟuturu 1
Digital edition of SII 40.42 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
